Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cicero/Cermak
ShortDescription: Northbound 54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to construction near Cicero/Cermak

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Cermak, Kostner, 16th, Cicero and then resume their normal route on Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Cicero/Cermak.
